sprint.name: Shipping Sprint 01
sprint.goal: Survival Kit live for sale, Starter System assembled, funnel measurable

tasks.title: Parse corpus into Kit data model
tasks.detail: 127 phrases / 11 categories + 7 game sets + 7 marker groups from corpus_extract_core.json

tasks.title: Survival Kit PDF workbook
tasks.detail: 13-page branded workbook, dark + light themes, clickable trial CTA

tasks.title: Sprint board build + deploy
tasks.detail: This board: sprint.json + kanban page on GitHub Pages, agents push updates

tasks.title: Audio pack (edge-tts)
tasks.detail: 399 MP3s: 127 normal + 127 slow + 127 slower + 11 tracks + 7 game, pt-BR voice, 0 failures. Codex leg: spec in codex-task-T04-audio.md

tasks.title: Package Kit zip + readme
tasks.detail: Both PDFs + audio pack + buyer readme, ready for Payhip upload

tasks.title: Payhip listing copy
tasks.detail: Paste-ready title + description + $19 anchor copy (payhip-listing.md) and product thumbnail with both covers

tasks.title: Kit language QA pass
tasks.detail: Review both PDFs: naturalness, register, accents, answer-key correctness

tasks.title: Payhip account + product upload
tasks.detail: Create free Payhip account, upload zip, enable per-buyer PDF stamping

tasks.title: Landing page buy section
tasks.detail: Kit section on speak-like-yourself with Payhip buy button, dark brand

tasks.title: Starter System assembly
tasks.detail: $49.99 anchor: Kit + Eu-series workbooks + scenario packs + conjugations + vocab list

tasks.title: Real review quote on landing page
tasks.detail: Swap blockquote placeholder for an exact named Preply review

tasks.title: Landing analytics
tasks.detail: GoatCounter + per-pin src tags so funnel clicks become measurable

tasks.title: Pinterest developer app
tasks.detail: App created (ID 1587877) on Business account. App form finished + dev-support ticket "Trial approval" submitted 2026-07-09. Reviewer (Teri) replied 2026-07-09 with two blockers: (1) incomplete privacy policy, (2) URL-account relation not verified. Both resolved 2026-07-10: privacy.html rewritten with Pinterest-API disclosures (API use, non-affiliation, data deletion on disconnect, no resale, contact email) and deployed; website claimed via p:domain_verify meta tag under Settings > Link to Pinterest. Reply drafted for Rafael to send; awaiting re-review of the app.

tasks.title: Automated pin poster
tasks.detail: Poster workflow BUILT + queue seeded (10 pins). OAuth 2.0 flow completed 2026-07-10: write-scoped token obtained (boards/pins read+write), saved to .credentials/Preply/pinterest-oauth.json. Reads return live prod data; pin body verified correct. BLOCKED: app is Trial tier - pin CREATE in production returns 403 code 29 (Trial can post only to sandbox). Needs Trial->Standard upgrade, which requires a demo video showing the OAuth flow + API call. Manual posting continues meanwhile.

tasks.title: Reddit/Quora question mining
tasks.detail: Weekly note of real questions matching corpus answers; queue-ready for Draft Factory

tasks.title: Opus orchestrator system
tasks.detail: orchestrate.ps1: bus reports -> Opus 4.8 decides -> dispatches codex/hermes/worker/scripts. 2x daily n8n cron + on-demand. Dry-run validated.

tasks.title: Rebuild favorite-capture trigger
tasks.detail: Preply stopped emailing on favorite (push-only now), so the Gmail-triggered fast-responder is dead. BUILT 2026-07-09 (Option B transport, works on WiFi+cellular): MacroDroid (Android notification trigger) -> Google Apps Script web app -> Google Sheet -> n8n Google Sheets Trigger -> reuse existing template + Telegram draft + 72h follow-up. Files: C:\n8n\Preply\preply-favorite-capture.gs + preply-favorite-fastresponder-v2.n8n.json. Name regex verified on sample pushes. Waiting on Rafael: install MacroDroid + deploy Apps Script + import workflow. NOTE: Telegram-as-transport ruled out (bots can't read other bots' messages).

log.what: Sprint opened. Kit data model parsed (T01 done).
Survival Kit PDFs built: dark + light, 13 pages, linked trial CTA (T02 done).
Sprint board built and deployed (T03 done).
Model routing set: Codex takes T04 (audio pack, single-scope leg); Claude keeps T06/T10; Hermes keeps T07/T15. Codex dispatched, T04 -> Doing.
T04 synthesis running: state file live, audio/ folders created (first dispatch was sandbox-blocked, re-dispatched unsandboxed).
Payhip listing copy + dual-cover product thumbnail shipped (T06 done).
T04 -> done.
T05 -> done.
Added T16: Opus orchestrator system (claude, 5 pts).
T16 -> done.
T07 -> doing.
T10 -> doing.

T04 done: 272 audio files (127 normal + 127 slow + 11 tracks + 7 game), 0 failures, 9 MB. package-kit.ps1 verified + zipped 6.8 MB (T05 done). Orchestrator dry-run plan executed: T07 Hermes QA + T10 Starter System -> Doing.
T11 -> done.

Orchestrator fixed: SYSTEM-account credential shim (n8n cron was failing with Not logged in) + Start-Process arg quoting. T07/T10 dispatches had silently failed (arg splitting + wrong username in paths); both re-dispatched.
T07 -> done.
T07 Kit language QA complete: both PDFs reviewed, 0 issues. Kit is upload-ready.
T12 -> todo.
T12 promoted backlog -> todo (funnel-measurable pillar); analytics build dispatched to worker (build-only, no live push).
T15 backlog -> doing; Reddit/Quora mining notes created from corpus themes with queue-ready drafts under Approval Queue/2026-07-08 Batch 01/reddit-quora/.
T04 rev2: added slower audio tier (+127 files). Pack now 399 MP3s (127 normal + 127 slow + 127 slower + 11 tracks + 7 game), 0 failures.

T10 progress: Starter System structure staged (manifest, buyer 90-day TOC + Noite Carioca cover concept, gap list). Component builds still missing (Eu-series, conjugation sheets, scenario packs, vocab list); worker was write-blocked so artifacts staged, not in products/. Stays Doing.
Rafael approvals: Pinterest Batch 01 pins approved; Reddit/Quora drafts approved. T15 -> done (mining + queue-ready drafts validated).
Orchestrator cron workflow confirmed live and running (n8n import + Telegram cred + CHAT_ID done). T16 setup no longer pending.
Added T17: rebuild favorite-capture trigger. Preply killed favorite notification emails (push-only now), breaking the Gmail-triggered fast-responder; plan = phone notification bridge -> n8n webhook.
T13 -> done: Pinterest app (ID 1587877) created on Business account, app form finished, dev-support ticket submitted. Awaiting Trial-access grant.

T14 pin poster PARKED: prod + sandbox tokens both return code 3 'consumer type not supported' until Pinterest grants an access tier. Unblocked T13 dependency; now waiting on Pinterest, not on us. Build resumes when GET /v5/boards returns data.
T17 built (Option B): MacroDroid -> Apps Script -> Google Sheet -> n8n Sheets Trigger -> existing template + Telegram draft + 72h follow-up. Files in C:\n8n\Preply. Name regex dry-run verified.

T17 import BLOCKED: validated the workflow JSON (parses, 5 nodes + connections intact, both placeholders present) but n8n MCP can't import raw JSON (only SDK-code workflows). Import stays a manual 'Import from File' for Rafael, folded into his activation step.

T13 reviewer response handled: Pinterest reviewer Teri flagged an incomplete privacy policy + unverified URL-account relation. Rewrote privacy.html with Pinterest-API disclosures (explicit API use, non-affiliation, data deletion on disconnect, no resale, contact email rafael.automations@gmail.com), deployed live. Claimed the website via p:domain_verify meta tag (Settings > Link to Pinterest) added to index.html + privacy.html. Drafted reply for Rafael to send; app awaiting re-review.

T08 -> done: Survival Kit live on Payhip (https://payhip.com/b/F5bcR), Pinterest linked, Stripe payment setup in progress. Unblocks T09 (landing buy section). Added 8 gallery/thumbnail value images + purchase-confirmation email copy.
PDF stamping ENABLED on Payhip (Account > Settings > Advanced Settings). Anti-piracy layer live; T08 fully closed with no open items.

T14 -> review: Pinterest app approved. Built daily poster workflow (preply-pinterest-poster.n8n.json) + normalized queue/ledger under C:
8n\Preply\posting. Dry-run passes. Blocked only on regenerating the access token (old one returns 401), then a live single-pin test.

T14: completed Pinterest OAuth (write scopes granted) and proved the poster pipeline end-to-end. Blocked on Trial->Standard access upgrade - Trial tier cannot create pins in production (403 code 29). Next: submit Standard-access application w/ demo video. Tokens saved to .credentials.
